rationale: The cited study is tightly connected to the citing paper’s NB-versus-PL core mechanisms: it models NB price premium willingness via perceived quality gaps and innovation, while the citing paper analyzes NB/PL competitive outcomes with brand-strength and price-gap moderators in new-product introductions. With this strong conceptual overlap plus an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.47.6.1011), the citation is not safely treated as an obvious background-only mention.
